medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Developed a deep vein thrombosis consequent to surgical placement of a titanium rod to correct a fracture of the femur. Maintained for over a year on daily oral doses of Coumadin 9 mg and aspirin 325 mg. Began to bruise spontaneously with multiple large hematomas appearing without provocation.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Previously healthy, fracture of the right femur corrected by insertion of a titanium rod.
medical_history.family_history: No known family history of DVT or coagulation abnormalities.
